footer.tagline: Turning memories into art for a lifetime.

samples.heading: Flip through a sample book.
samples.intro: Every book here was made the same way yours will be — a family memory, a few photos, and a whole lot of warm fuzzies.
samples.emptyTitle: The first sample books are still at the printer's.
samples.emptyBody: Check back very soon — or skip the queue and make a book starring your own family.
samples.closingTitle: Ready to see your own family in one of these?
